F1-FM-01: novel simple targets that reduce whole-form memorization
explanation of what the symbol is doing in the word
F1-FM-02: very small target set in both directions
consistent oral sound and written symbol routine
F1-FM-03: stable small sound-symbol set across several trials
one new target added after visible stability
explicit contrast between old and new targets
F1-FM-04: paired reading and spelling of the same target
say the sound while writing or selecting the symbol
immediate shift from one direction to the other
